meaning: n.公差,宽容,忍受,容忍,(食物中残存杀虫剂的)(法定)容许量vt.给(机器部件等)规定公差
examples: She had no tolerance for jokes of any kind.
They were working to a tolerance of 0.0001 of a centimetre.
They have a policy of zero tolerance for sexual harassment.
Britons' tolerance of the other myriad intrusions into their privacy may prove less enduring.
The moulds are very accurate, with a precision tolerance of as little as 0.002 millimeters.
